Package i5.cb

Class CBConfiguration

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.CBConfiguration

  • public class CBConfiguration
extends java.lang.Object
    Hold the userconfiguration for the CBjavaInterface. The config is stored to a file in the user's homedirectory when CBEditor is finished and loaded again when it's started. The file's name is defined CONFIGFILE_NAME.

        public CBConfiguration​()

    • Method Detail

      • openConfig

        public static void openConfig​()
        Defines defaultvalues for all options and tries to load a properties object from a file. Uses all default-options that have not been overridden by the file's porperties.

      • storeConfig

        public static void storeConfig​()
        Stores the prperties object representing the configuration to disk

      • setComponentView

        public static void setComponentView​(java.lang.String view)
        Determines the content of the big componentview of the diagramNodes
        Parameters:
        view - one of VALUE_TREE or VALUE_FRAME as defined in CBConstants.

      • getComponentView

        public static void getComponentView​(javax.swing.JRadioButtonMenuItem tree,
                                    javax.swing.JRadioButtonMenuItem frame)
        Sets the two radiobuttons (which form a buttongroup) according to the setting of the diagramNode's component view

      • setInvalidOjsMethod

        public static void setInvalidOjsMethod​(java.lang.String method)
        Tell the config what to do with invalid nodes.
        Parameters:
        method - one of VALUE_MARK or VALUE_REMOVE as defined in

      • getInvalidOjsMethod

        public static java.lang.String getInvalidOjsMethod​(javax.swing.JRadioButtonMenuItem mark,
                                                   javax.swing.JRadioButtonMenuItem remove)
        Sets the two radiobuttons (which form a buttongroup) according to what to do with invalid nodes on the diagramDesktop.

      • getSaveGraphTypes

        public static boolean getSaveGraphTypes​()
        Tells if the graphtypes are also to be saved when a layout is saved.
        Returns:
        true if graphTypes are saved as well, false otherwise.

      • bashInstalled

        public static boolean bashInstalled​()
        Test if 'bash.exe' is installed; this indicates that Windows 10 has the Linux sub-system installed
        Returns:
        true if 'bash.exe' is installed

      • plainWindows

        public static boolean plainWindows​()

      • anyLinux

        public static boolean anyLinux​()

      • anyWindows

        public static boolean anyWindows​()

        public static java.lang.String defaultCbHome​()

      • getCbHome

        public static java.lang.String getCbHome​()

      • getCBserverCmd

        public static java.lang.String getCBserverCmd​()

      • getHomedLocation

        public static java.lang.String getHomedLocation​(java.lang.String dir)

      • setSaveGraphTypes

        public static void setSaveGraphTypes​(java.lang.String value)
        Sets wheter graphTypes are to be saved in a graphLayout.
        Parameters:
        value - One of VALUE_TRUE or VALUE_FALSE as defined in GEConstants

      • addRecentQuery

        public static void addRecentQuery​(java.lang.String sQuery,
                                  java.lang.String sHost,
                                  java.lang.String sPort)
        Adds a new querystring to the history of queries for a certain server.
        Parameters:
        sQuery - the querystring
        sHost - the server's host name
        sPort - the server's portnumber

      • getRecentQueries

        public static java.lang.String[] getRecentQueries​(java.lang.String sHost,
                                                  java.lang.String sPort)
        Gets all queries that have been asked to a certain ConceptBase server recently
        Parameters:
        sHost - the server's host
        sPort - the server's port
        Returns:
        an Array of String containing all queries asked so far.

      • getRecentServers

        public static java.lang.String[] getRecentServers​()
        Returns an array containing the addresses and ports of all CBservers visited so far.
        Returns:
        every even index of the array contains a server address and the following (odd) index contains the portnumber

      • addNewConnection

        public static void addNewConnection​(java.lang.String sHost,
                                    java.lang.String sPort)
        Adds the address and port of another ConceptBase server we successfully connected to to the configuration
        Parameters:
        sHost - the CB server's address
        sPort - the port this server listens to

      • getStartingObjects

        public static java.lang.String[] getStartingObjects​(java.lang.String sHost,
                                                    java.lang.String sPort)
        Returns all former startingobjects for the specified cbserver
        Parameters:
        sHost - the server's hostname
        sPort - the server's portnumber
        Returns:
        the telosobjects sessions were recently started with

      • getGraphicalPalettes

        public static java.lang.String[] getGraphicalPalettes​(java.lang.String sHost,
                                                      java.lang.String sPort)
        Gets the graphical palettes for a certain ConceptBase server.
        Parameters:
        sHost - the server's hostname
        sPort - the server's portnumber
        Returns:
        the graphical palettes

      • addStartingObject

        public static void addStartingObject​(java.lang.String sObject,
                                     java.lang.String sHost,
                                     java.lang.String sPort)
        Adds a new initial telosobject to the connection specified with sHost and sPort. If there is no such connection yet, one is created
        Parameters:
        sObject - the telosobjects name
        sHost - the address of the CBserver on which we started with this telosobject
        sPort - the CBserver's port

      • addGraphicalPalette

        public static void addGraphicalPalette​(java.lang.String sPalette,
                                       java.lang.String sHost,
                                       java.lang.String sPort)
        Adds a graphical palette for a certaing cbserver
        Parameters:
        sPalette - the palette's name
        sHost - the address of the CBserver on which we started with this telosobject
        sPort - the CBserver's port

      • setDDColor

        public static void setDDColor​(java.awt.Color color)
        Sets the backgroundcolor of all diagramDesktops
        Parameters:
        color - the color our diagramDesktops shall have.

        public static java.awt.Color getDDColor​()
        Gets the diagramDesktops' color.
